input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.8.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.8.1
            TITLE: all costs in the cost report must come from the standardized cost tables.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.8.1: All costs in the Cost Report must come from the standardized Cost Tables.
S.3.8.1 All costs in the Cost Report must come from the standardized Cost Tables.

final_answer: All costs in the Cost Report must come from the standardized Cost Tables.
